{{Expand}}

{{Infobox sacred-art
| name = Rune Queen's script
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The script of the [[Rune Queen]] manipulates time in one specific way.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Sacred Arts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
